request_payload.exposure_text: As a retired FEMA coordinator, I've seen firsthand how underfunded civil defense programs leave communities vulnerable. While some argue for cutting these programs to save money, we can't afford to gamble with public safety. Even small investments in preparedness can prevent disasters from becoming catastrophes. #NationalSecurity #CommunitySafety
